infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: AthliAI needs access to your location to track runs, map workouts, and provide stats even when the app is not in the foreground.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: AthliAI uses your location to provide accurate workout tracking and performance insights even in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AthliAI uses your location to track your runs and routes while you use the app.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AthliAI uses your camera to let you capture workout photos and share progress.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: AthliAI may use your microphone for audio features while recording workouts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AthliAI accesses your photo library so you can upload and share pictures of your activities.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: AthliAI uses your location to track runs and provide detailed stats even in the background.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow AthliAI to access your camera for workout and progress photos.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow AthliAI to access your microphone for audio features.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow AthliAI to access your photos so you can upload and share pictures of your workouts.
